case_title: CITY HOUSING ,INC. VS. DEBORAH HARTE et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HARTE, DEBORAH
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING ,INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING ,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARTE, DEBORAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 440 EDDY ST. #406, S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HARTE, DEBORAH
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE, $15.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING ,INC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING ,INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HARTE, DEBORAH DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING ,INC. SERVED SEP-03-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HARTE, DEBORAH
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT HARTE, DEBORAH
